briefdescription.para: HAL module driver. This is the common part of the HAL initialization.

detaileddescription.para:
MCD Application Team
Copyright (c) 2017 STMicroelectronics. All rights reserved.
This software is licensed under terms that can be found in the LICENSE file in the root directory of this software component. If no LICENSE file comes with this software, it is provided AS-IS.

para.verbatim: ============================================================================== ##### How to use this driver ##### ============================================================================== [..] The common HAL driver contains a set of generic and common APIs that can be used by the PPP peripheral drivers and the user to start using the HAL. [..] The HAL contains two APIs' categories: (+) Common HAL APIs (+) Services HAL APIs
